NOTE: Do NOT manually edit this file. This file is automatically updated when semantic release (release.yml) runs. Manually editing this file can break your releases and break third party tools that use this file.

patches.name: Add Stremio button
patches.description: Adds a purple Stremio button to film pages. Placed below the trailer button when a trailer exists, or in the trailer button's usual position when there is none. Opens the film directly in the Stremio app or web player.

patches.name: Add Stremio button
patches.description: Adds a purple Stremio button to film pages, placed below the trailer button when one exists or in its position when it does not. Opens the film directly in the Stremio app or web player.
